title: Add scratch Pi runner adapter for ticks orchestration
description: Start over on the Pi orchestrator by documenting a fresh Pi runner adapter in the distributable ticks skill. Remove/ignore any stale local pi-runner artifacts. Update runner-neutral docs so Pi is a first-class harness alongside Claude and Codex. Capture Pi-specific opportunities: richer TUI/UX and per-role/per-tick provider routing (e.g. Claude planning, Codex/OpenAI implementation).
acceptance_criteria: skills/ticks/references/pi-runner.md exists; agent-runner.md points Pi users to it; skill docs mention Pi as a harness; no tracked old pi orchestrator remains
closed_reason: Completed: added fresh Pi runner adapter, linked it from runner-neutral and skill docs, and removed stale local pi-runner logs
